---
title: ""
editor: visual
---

::: {.quote}
*"The goal is to turn data into information, and information into insight."* -- Carly Fiorina.
:::

<iframe src="resume/Kwabena_Duffuor_Resume.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px;">
</iframe>

::: {.quote}
*For a tailored or most up-to-date version, feel free to reach out directly.*
:::
